basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support, Office Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AIIMS Kalyani website. The last date to submit the application form is 15-07-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years for PTS-I, Max 45 years for Office Helper
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) is 28 years. Maximum age limit for Office Helper is 45 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc MLT / DMLT with One years of experience, MSc MLT / MSc. Microbiology / MSc. Biotechnology or relevant subjects with formal training in methods related to molecular diagnostics, Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I): BSc MLT / DMLT with One year of experience OR MSc MLT / MSc. Microbiology / MSc. Biotechnology or relevant subjects with formal training in methods related to molecular diagnostics. Office Helper: Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Kalyani Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: BSc MLT / DMLT with One years of experience, MSc MLT / MSc. Microbiology / MSc. Biotechnology or relevant subjects with formal training in methods related to molecular diagnostics, Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board
Max 28 years for PTS-I, Max 45 years for Office Helper

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Kalyani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Kalyani Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I): BSc MLT / DMLT with One year of experience OR MSc MLT / MSc. Microbiology / MSc. Biotechnology or relevant subjects with formal training in methods related to molecular diagnostics. Office Helper: Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) is 28 years. Maximum age limit for Office Helper is 45 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Kalyani recruitment is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Helper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board to be eligible for the Office Helper position.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-I (PTS-I) post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates are required to apply online through the official AIIMS Kalyani website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: The official website of AIIMS Kalyani is https://aiimskalyani.edu.in.
